related.name: ♂ Mars
related.teaser: Mars is the blade of fire — spear of will, tower’s flame, the storm of courage.

related.name: Ares
related.teaser: Ares is a spark that purifies — Spear; under Mars; in Aries; with XVI The Tower.

related.name: ♄ Saturn
related.teaser: Saturn is the black mountain — the ring of time, stern father, weight of law.

related.name: Garnet
related.teaser: Solar fire is the sovereign flame—the courage to act and become.

related.name: XVI. The Tower
related.teaser: The Tower is the strike of lightning, shattering false structures — liberation through destruction.

related.name: Hephaestus
related.teaser: Hephaestus embodies forge, craft, volcano — under Vulcan/Mars; in Capricorn, Aries.

related.name: Vulcan
related.teaser: Vulcan embodies forge, craft, volcano — under Vulcan/Mars; in Capricorn, Aries.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: ᚦ Thurisaz
related.teaser: Thurisaz is the thunder-thorn — the jolt that makes a clear edge.

related.name: Sekhmet
related.teaser: Sekhmet embodies creation, cosmic order — under Sun · Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.

related.name: Obsidian
related.teaser: Root is the bedrock, the earth’s embrace — anchoring the soul into form.

related.name: Sol
related.teaser: Solar plexus is the furnace of power — fire of will, anger purified into radiance.
